[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111000 3
1 1010010 3
2 1100011 4
3 1000001 2
4 1000010 2
5 0001000 1
6 0111101 5
7 1010010 3

01 10 0001000 1 match 5
12 21 0111101 5 match 6
23 32 1010010 3 match 1 7
34 43 1101010 4
45 54 0110001 3
56 65 0100010 2
67 76 1011100 4
70 07 1000010 2 match 4

13 31 1101111 6
24 42 0111000 3 match 0

46 64 0010011 3
